title: chrysanthemum ochroleucum
intro: Chrysanthemum ochroleucum, also known as the yellow chrysanthemum or yellow mum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum ochroleucum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and improving eyesight, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and cardiovascular diseases. Chrysanthemum ochroleucum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
